reasons: Acceptance criterion 'Dubbed audio duration equals timeline' passed: validation test suite includes an injected mismatch case and validatePipelineArtifacts returns failure; valid fixture passes.
Acceptance criterion 'Segment count preserved' passed: validation test suite injects transcript segment-count mismatch and validation fails as expected.
Acceptance criterion 'Final video has one audio stream' passed: validation test suite injects a two-audio-stream final video and validation fails as expected.

Acceptance criterion 'Fail on any violation' and verification steps 'Inject invalid data'/'Verify pipeline fails' passed: all invalid-data tests in tests/validation.test.js fail validation while pass fixture succeeds.
run_commands: cd projects/pipeline-runner && npm test 2>&1 && node --test tests/validation.test.js 2>&1
summary: Validated work_3_validation_layer with targeted behavior checks. The validation module correctly enforces timeline/audio duration equality, segment-count preservation, and single-audio-stream final video constraints, and it fails deterministically on injected violations.
